Metadata.title: Loyalty CRM
Metadata.description: Admin dashboard for the loyalty program

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Pick a type and the customers to send it to.
Notifications.sendDescription: Sending runs in the background and respects each customer's marketing preferences.
Notifications.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or email…

Auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Check your inbox.
Auth.magicLinkError: We couldn't send the sign-in link
Auth.errorForbidden: You don't have access to that section. Sign in with an authorized account.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.healthClientDescription: tRPC + React Query from the client

Shortlinks.title: Short links
Shortlinks.subtitle: Shorten URLs for SMS/WhatsApp and track clicks.

WhatsAppOutbox.title: WhatsApp Outbox
WhatsAppOutbox.subtitle: Messages persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/whatsapp. Dev + preview only.
WhatsAppOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers a send via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
WhatsAppOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting messages? Make sure the app runs with WHATSAPP_PROVIDER=outbox.

SmsOutbox.title: SMS Outbox
SmsOutbox.subtitle: Messages persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/sms. Dev + preview only.
SmsOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers an SMS via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
SmsOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting messages? Make sure the app runs with SMS_PROVIDER=outbox.

EmailOutbox.title: Email Outbox
EmailOutbox.subtitle: Emails persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/email. Dev + preview only.
EmailOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers an email via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
EmailOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting emails? Make sure the app runs with EMAIL_PROVIDER=outbox.
EmailOutbox.testResendHint: Sends a real email via Resend.
EmailOutbox.testSent: Test email queued via {mailer}. If the active provider is outbox it will appear below in a few seconds.

PushOutbox.title: Push Outbox
PushOutbox.subtitle: Push notifications persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/push. Dev + preview only.
PushOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers a push via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
PushOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting pushes? Make sure the app runs with PUSH_PROVIDER=outbox.
PushOutbox.testSent: Push sent to {count, plural, one {# device} other {# devices}}. It will appear below in a few seconds.

Realtime.title: Realtime smoke
Realtime.notConfiguredDescription: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST + PARTYKIT_HOST + PARTYKIT_PROJECT + REALTIME_AUTH_SECRET to enable the channel.
Realtime.sendDescription: Publishes a dev.hello event into your own room. You'll see it below within milliseconds.
Realtime.eventsDescription: Last 25 live events in your room.
Realtime.emptyLog: No events yet. Wait for the handshake (should be instant) and fire a hello.

Promotions.title: Promotions
Promotions.empty: No promotions yet. Create your first one.
Promotions.forbidden: You need the manager role to manage promotions.
